visibleItems.title: The smallest useful transformation plan

visibleItems.excerpt_html: A simple planning pattern for moving from vague improvement goals to manageable technology-enabled changes.

visibleItems.title: (Part 1 of 3) The New Divide in A.I.: It Isn't About Speed Anymore
visibleItems.title_html: (Part 1 of 3) The New Divide in A.I.: It Isn't About Speed Anymore
visibleItems.excerpt: The assumption was simple: if you could move faster than your competitors, you would eventually outperform them. Today, that assumption is becoming less true. The organizations gaining a lasting advantage aren't necessarily the ones moving the fastest. They're the ones making better decisions.
visibleItems.excerpt_html: The assumption was simple: if you could move faster than your competitors, you would eventually outperform them. Today, that assumption is becoming less true. The organizations gaining a lasting advantage aren't necessarily the ones moving the fastest. They're the ones making better decisions.
